# Online Clipboard

Online Clipboard is a free, secure web-based tool for saving and sharing text, code, images, and links across devices.

## Features
- Save text, code snippets, images, and URLs
- Password protection with bcrypt encryption
- Auto-expiry with self-destructing clips
- Code syntax highlighting for 20+ programming languages
- Public and private clip visibility
- Instant shareable links
- Cross-device access from any browser
- Tag-based organization
- View count tracking

## Use Cases
- Developers sharing code snippets
- Writers saving research notes
- Designers sharing visual references
- Teams collaborating on projects
- Students saving study materials

## Pricing
Free forever. No credit card required. No limits.

## URL
https://onlineclipboard.pro
